reviews.review_description: Only in the first levels and fair on the timer and I hate those normally but actually can’t believe it wasnt frustrating or so far now so great job and hope devs make updates caus it’s fun and cute character games for sure!! Ty devs

I played such a game a lot in my youth. Matching 2 cards. But this one is very challenging. You don’t have much time to pair. 

I am left handed, so it would be good to see, that you can use your left hand to, to turn the cards.
And a return to the menu button.

developer_response.body:
Hi POWERGIRL.BE, thank you for the feedback and for playing! We’re sorry for the delay in responding, as we weren’t notified by Meta about your review.

Regarding left-handed play: the game fully supports it. In the lobby, you’ll see two 3D controllers labeled “Left” and “Right.” Simply point your beam at the left controller and select it to use your left hand in-game.

We also identified and fixed an issue where the hand selection could reset when starting a new game. The latest update now keeps your left-hand choice active when you enter gameplay.

We’ve noted your request for a dedicated return-to-menu button as well. Thanks again, and happy matching!

reviews.review_description: Awesome game for all ages. Reminds me of the classic memory card matching game. My kids and I really enjoy this game.
